debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
n m : CartSpᵒᵖ
f : n ⟶ m
ω : DSmoothMap (Eucl (Opposite.unop n)) (Eucl (Opposite.unop n) [⋀^Fin k]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ)
this : ContDiff ℝ (↑⊤) (fderiv ℝ f.unop.toFun)
⊢ DSmooth fun x => (ω (f.unop x)).compLinearMap ↑(fderiv ℝ (⇑f.unop) x)

failed_attempts: exact dsmooth_of_contDiff (by exact ContDiff.comp (by exact contDiff_const) (f.unop.dsmooth.contDiff.prod (contDiff_top.mpr this)))

refine DSmooth.comp₂ ?_ (ω.dsmooth.comp f.unop.dsmooth) (dsmooth_of_contDiff this)
        exact dsmooth_of_contDiff contDiff_compLinearMap

exact DSmooth.comp (g := fun p => p.1.compLinearMap p.2.toLinearMap)
          (dsmooth_of_contDiff (by sorry)) (ω.dsmooth.comp f.unop.dsmooth).prod_mk
          (dsmooth_of_contDiff this)
exact (ω.dsmooth.comp f.unop.dsmooth).comp₂ (dsmooth_of_contDiff this) (fun a b => a.compLinearMap b.toLinearMap) sorry⟩
exact dsmooth_of_locally_dsmooth fun x => ⟨Set.univ, isOpen_univ, Set.mem_univ x, sorry⟩⟩

exact DSmooth.comp (g := fun p => p.1.compLinearMap p.2.toLinearMap) 
          sorry (ω.dsmooth.comp f.unop.dsmooth).prod_mk (contDiff_fderiv.dsmooth)
